pitch_global: Put Mickael in his cozy living room, browsing through travel websites on his laptop. This person is hesitating, but then takes a deep breath and clicks the 'Book Now' button for an overwater villa in the Maldives. Transition to Mickael arriving at the villa, stepping onto the wooden deck with the turquoise ocean stretching out before him. This person is taking a moment to soak in the view, eyes wide with awe. Next, put Mickael lounging on a sunbed, sipping a refreshing drink, and smiling as the gentle breeze brushes against his skin. This person is feeling the serenity of the place, visibly relaxed. Then, show Mickael snorkeling in the clear waters, surrounded by vibrant marine life. This person is swimming gracefully, a look of wonder on his face as he explores the underwater world. Finally, put Mickael on the deck at sunset, watching the sky turn shades of pink and orange. This person is reflecting on the day, a content smile on his face, feeling grateful for the experience.

imaginaire_collectif.imaginaire: The quintessential image of a dream in the Maldives features a luxurious overwater villa surrounded by crystal-clear turquoise waters. The villa stands on stilts above the gentle waves, offering a panoramic view of the endless ocean. White sandy beaches and lush palm trees complete the idyllic scene, with a vibrant sunset casting a warm glow over the tranquil setting.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael is in his cozy living room, browsing travel websites on his laptop. He hesitates, then takes a deep breath and clicks 'Book Now' for an overwater villa in the Maldives, marking the start of his dream journey.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting upright, leaning slightly forward with focus on the laptop.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: Leans back slightly, hand moving to click the mouse.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael arrives at the villa, stepping onto the wooden deck. He pauses to take in the breathtaking view of the turquoise ocean, his eyes wide with awe as he realizes his dream.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Standing with a relaxed posture, arms slightly open.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: Moves from holding a suitcase to standing at the deck's edge.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael lounges on a sunbed, sipping a refreshing drink. The gentle breeze and ocean view bring a serene smile to his face, as he feels completely relaxed in this paradise.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Lying back comfortably, eyes closed with a gentle smile.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: Remains mostly still, slight movements as he sips his drink.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael snorkels in the clear waters, surrounded by vibrant marine life. He swims gracefully, his face lit up with wonder as he explores the underwater world.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Floating with fluid movements, eyes wide with curiosity.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: Moves smoothly through the water, observing marine life.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: As the sun sets, Mickael sits on the deck, watching the sky turn pink and orange. He reflects on the day's experiences, a content smile on his face, feeling grateful for this moment.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting with a relaxed posture, hands resting on knees.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: Remains seated, slight head movements as he watches the sunset.

cadrages.justification_plan: Permet de voir l'interaction entre Mickael et son environnement, soulignant son hésitation et sa décision.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Renforce l'intimité et l'engagement de Mickael alors qu'il prend la décision de réserver.
cadrages.justification_angle: Identification du spectateur avec Mickael, partageant son moment de décision.

cadrages.justification_plan: Capture l'immensité de l'océan et la beauté de l'environnement, accentuant le sentiment d'émerveillement de Mickael.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Permet de découvrir progressivement le cadre magnifique, renforçant l'effet de surprise et d'émerveillement.
cadrages.justification_angle: Accentue la grandeur de l'océan et la petite taille de Mickael face à cette immensité, soulignant son émerveillement.

cadrages.justification_plan: Montre Mickael dans un moment de détente, tout en intégrant l'environnement relaxant autour de lui.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Stabilité qui reflète la tranquillité et la sérénité du moment.
cadrages.justification_angle: Permet au spectateur de se connecter avec le sentiment de relaxation de Mickael.

cadrages.justification_plan: Met en valeur l'environnement sous-marin et la présence de Mickael parmi la vie marine.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Accompagne le mouvement fluide de Mickael, soulignant son exploration et son émerveillement.
cadrages.justification_angle: Offre une vue immersive de l'expérience sous-marine, permettant au spectateur de partager l'émerveillement de Mickael.

cadrages.justification_plan: Capture Mickael dans un moment de réflexion tout en intégrant le magnifique coucher de soleil.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Stabilité qui reflète la paix intérieure et la gratitude de Mickael.
cadrages.justification_angle: Accentue la vulnérabilité et la tendresse du moment de réflexion de Mickael.

scenes.justification: Scène d'ouverture, immersion nécessaire pour montrer la décision de Mickael de réaliser son rêve.
Transition rapide pour montrer l'arrivée et le premier émerveillement de Mickael.
Moment de détente et de relaxation, suffisant pour établir l'ambiance sereine.
Exploration sous-marine dynamique, montrant l'émerveillement et l'esprit d'aventure.
Scène finale, impact émotionnel avec la réflexion et la gratitude de Mickael.

prompts_video.prompt: Put Mickael in his cozy living room during the afternoon. The room has a large window overlooking a garden, and a laptop is open on a wooden coffee table. Mickael, a 35-year-old man, is sitting barefoot on the couch, wearing a grey t-shirt and blue jeans, with reading glasses perched on his nose. He is hesitating, scrolling through travel websites. The camera captures a medium close-up of Mickael's face, showing his initial hesitation. As he takes a deep breath, the camera slowly zooms in, focusing on his hand as he clicks the 'Book Now' button for an overwater villa in the Maldives. The lighting is warm and natural, highlighting the serene atmosphere of the room.

Transition to Mickael arriving at the wooden deck of an overwater villa in the Maldives, during the morning. The turquoise ocean stretches out before him. Mickael, now wearing a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat, stands on the deck with a small suitcase in hand. The camera uses a wide shot to capture the breathtaking view and Mickael's anticipation. As he steps to the edge of the deck, arms slightly open, the camera moves to a medium shot, capturing his eyes wide with awe as he takes in the view. The lighting is bright and clear, emphasizing the vibrant colors of the ocean and sky.

Put Mickael lounging on a sunbed on the deck of the overwater villa at midday. He is wearing the same white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and straw hat. The camera captures a medium shot of Mickael sipping a refreshing drink, visibly relaxed. The gentle breeze brushes against his skin, and he smiles contentedly. The camera slowly pans to show the serene ocean view, then returns to Mickael, who lies back with his eyes closed, a gentle smile on his face. The lighting is soft and warm, enhancing the peaceful ambiance.

Show Mickael snorkeling in the clear waters near the overwater villa in the afternoon. He is wearing snorkeling gear, swim trunks, flippers, and a snorkel mask. The camera captures a wide shot of Mickael floating among vibrant marine life, his curiosity evident. As he swims gracefully, the camera moves to a medium shot, focusing on his face lit up with wonder. The underwater lighting is clear and bright, highlighting the colorful fish and coral around him.

Put Mickael on the deck of the overwater villa during the evening, watching the sky turn shades of pink and orange at sunset. He is wearing a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat. The camera captures a wide shot of Mickael sitting on the deck, hands resting on his knees, as he watches the horizon. The scene transitions to a medium shot, showing a content smile on his face as he reflects on the day. The lighting is warm and golden, enhancing the tranquil and reflective mood.

prompt_bande_son: Create a serene and calming soundtrack with gentle ocean waves, soft instrumental music, and occasional bird calls. The music should evoke a sense of tranquility and wonder, perfectly complementing the idyllic setting of an overwater villa in the Maldives.

metadata.dream: I dream of being in an overwater villa in the Maldives
